title: Student Exchange Programme with International Universities
content: Student Exchange Programme with International Universities JUIT, Waknaghat has student exchange programs with the University of Nebraska, Omaha, USA ( for the students of Department of Biotechnology & Bioinformatics ) and University of Florida, USA ( for all branch students ). The selected students pursue their final semester credits (Jan – June) at the respective US Universities. University of Nebraska Omaha, USA ( Student Exchange Programme ) University of Florida, USA ( Student Exchange Programme ) List of Selected Students B.Tech (All Branches) – 2014-18 List of Selected Students B.Tech (All Branches) – 2013-17 List of Selected Students B.Tech (All Branches) – 2012-16
